Thanks for the opening quote. That level is well above where this program can work for us at the stated volume, so I need to bring this closer to a realistic buy range on our side. I can open at 4.18 per unit if we keep the discussion focused on a dependable volume plan and straightforward terms, and if you have flexibility from there I'm prepared to keep working toward a structure that makes sense for both of us. The supplier opened far above the buyer's workable economics, so countering is better than accepting or ending the discussion. A low but not absurd counteroffer tests flexibility, preserves margin, and leaves room to negotiate over the remaining rounds.
